title: Counting & Cardinality
objective: Students will explore counting & cardinality concepts including Counting forwards and backwards (age 6+), Counting forwards and backwards.

steps.content: Welcome to an exciting lesson about Counting forwards and backwards (age 6+)!
Count forwards and backwards in tens from any number (not just multiples of 10)
Let's practice together! Count 7, 17, 27, 37 … from a non-multiple starting point
If you starts at 37 and you ask them to count up in tens, can they say 37, 47, 57, 67 — crossing over into the next hundred without getting stuck?
Great job! Today we learned about Counting forwards and backwards (age 6+). Count 7, 17, 27, 37 … from a non-multiple starting point Count backwards in tens from 83
Welcome to an exciting lesson about Counting forwards and backwards!
Count forwards and backwards in steps of 3 from 0
Let's practice together! Count 3, 6, 9, 12, 15 … up to at least 30
Can you count in threes — 3, 6, 9, 12, 15 — far enough to reach 30 without losing track or needing to start over?
You did it! Here's what we explored about Counting forwards and backwards: Count 3, 6, 9, 12, 15 … up to at least 30 Count backwards in 3s from 30
